extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH won the sprint into Carcassonne, extending his green jersey lead over Matthews who failed to score at the finish.
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck-Quick-Step with Tim Declercq controlled tempo throughout 220km stage to preserve Cavendish's legs for sprint.
Matthews failed to contest final sprint despite losing ground in green jersey competition, revealing possible form issues.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: extended green jersey lead to over 100 points after Matthews didn't score in final sprint
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: failed to score any points despite losing significant ground in green jersey competition
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: commentary suggests flat stages pose more danger to his GC lead than upcoming mountain stages
